nasb.text: All the crowds were amazed, and were saying, “This man cannot be the Son of David, can he?”

esv.text: And all the people were amazed, and said, “Can this be the Son of David?”

cnv.text: 群眾都很驚奇，說：“難道他就是大衛的子孫？”

ccb.text: 众人都很惊奇，就说：“这人会不会是大卫的那个后裔？”

csbs.text: 众人都十分惊讶，说：“难道这个人就是‘大卫的后裔’？”
